detail.description:
“Destined Khaganhood - Genghis Khan”, a Wishbeast of open spirit and fierce heart, is making his debut in the realms on 25 May (Mon)!

“Destined Khaganhood - Genghis Khan” is an extremely rare 7-star character that can be summoned along with another new character, “Incomparable Paean - Diana”, in the “Wish‑Driven Might” Diamond Seal during the event period. In addition, a new Side Story stage opens after the maintenance on 25 May (Mon), following the grand descent of “Destined Khaganhood - Gengh
